hero.badge: Claude Code plugin В· opensource В· local
hero.title: A confidant, as a Claude Code plugin
hero.subtitle: A persona, eighteen skills (recall, distill-session, exercise, crisis, вЂ¦), ten slash commands, deterministic safety hooks, and a plain-Markdown vault in ~/.claudia. Runs entirely in Claude Code.
install.title: INSTALL
privacy.title: ~/.claudia
privacy.body: Everything Claudia remembers is plain Markdown in a local vault. The full contract lives in docs/memory-layout.md вЂ” this is the shape:
privacy.tree:
~/.claudia/
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ MEMORY.md            <c># the index вЂ” loaded first</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ person.md            <c># the distilled person model</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ understanding.md     <c># working understanding вЂ” dated, correctable</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ goals.md             <c># agreed goals</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ themes.md            <c># recurring threads</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ themes/              <c># one note per thread that earned depth</c>
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ what steadies me.md
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ вЂ¦
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ people.md            <c># relationship map вЂ” a mermaid ecomap</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ people/              <c># one fiche per important person</c>
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ Devon.md
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ вЂ¦
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ timeline.md          <c># the life timeline, person-led</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ keepsakes.md         <c># passages kept verbatim вЂ” /keep</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ todo.md              <c># the shared to-do-later list</c>
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ sessions/            <c># one set of files per session</c>
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 2026-07-21-9113d5d7.summary.md      <c># distilled вЂ” read on recall</c>
в”‚   в”њв”Ђв”Ђ 2026-07-21-9113d5d7.transcript.md   <c># verbatim вЂ” your archive, not read back</c>
в”‚   в””в”Ђв”Ђ вЂ¦
в”њв”Ђв”Ђ dashboard.md         <c># derived mirror вЂ” /dashboard</c>
в””в”Ђв”Ђ config.json          <c># your switches вЂ” emoji, transcripts, language</c>
skills.title: SKILLS
skills.subtitle: What ships in the plugin вЂ” each one a readable SKILL.md.
skills.claudia.title: integrative
skills.claudia.description: The persona core (the claudia skill) вЂ” warm, immersive, generalist. Person-centered at the base; CBT, ACT, MI, solution-focused and mindfulness as the toolbox, reached for when indicated.
skills.memory.title: recall В· remember В· distill-session
skills.memory.description: The memory cycle вЂ” continuity loaded at open, the person model kept current along the way, a distilled summary written at close.
skills.consult.title: consult
skills.consult.description: A second opinion from any session вЂ” on a question, a text, a situation. Sealed by construction: no vault access, and she will neither confirm nor deny knowing anyone.
skills.exercise.title: exercise В· teach В· quiz
skills.exercise.description: Between-session material вЂ” thought records, values compasses, grounding practices, psychoeducation, recall drills. Written to the vault, in your language.
skills.maps.title: relationships В· themes В· timeline
skills.maps.description: The maps вЂ” a mermaid ecomap of your people, recurring threads you ratify, a person-led life timeline. Plain files, all correctable.
skills.reasoning.title: intake В· understand В· choose-approach
skills.reasoning.description: The pipeline вЂ” an intake pass when you arrive, a working understanding kept provisional and dated, the approach picked вЂ” and argued вЂ” case by case.
design.title: DESIGN
design.subtitle: Deliberate choices, recorded as ADRs in docs/adr/.
design.relationship.title: Common factors
design.relationship.description: The research is blunt: the relationship drives outcomes more than any technique (Wampold, 2015). So the always-on core is relational, and the techniques stay a toolbox вЂ” CBT, ACT, MI, solution-focused, mindfulness & self-compassion вЂ” reached for when indicated.
design.immersion.title: Deterministic hooks
design.immersion.description: Warm and in-character by default вЂ” no infantilising disclaimers вЂ” but hooks run deterministically on every turn, outside the model's discretion: detected risk swaps the persona for region-specific human resources. Not a clinician, not a medical device.
commands.title: COMMANDS
commands.subtitle: Ten slash commands total: six data/safety/memory controls, three pull-only orientation aids, one to keep a sentence that landed.
commands.thread: The thread of the conversation so far вЂ” a light reflection to gather back.
commands.dashboard: A bird's-eye mirror of where things are вЂ” pulled by you, never recited at you.
commands.keep: Keep a passage that landed, word for word, to re-read whenever.
commands.menu: Not sure where to start? A few things open for you right now.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.q1.question: Is Claudia therapy?
faq.q1.answer: No. Not a clinician, not a medical device. In crisis: /help-now.
faq.q2.question: What do I need to run her?
faq.q2.answer: Claude Code + a Claude subscription. Two commands, new session, talk.
faq.q3.question: Where does my data go?
faq.q3.answer: Nowhere. ~/.claudia on your machine; conversations go through Claude like any Claude Code session.
faq.q4.question: What does she cost?
faq.q4.answer: Nothing. MIT. You pay your own Claude usage.
faq.q5.question: Which languages does she speak?
cta.readySubtitle: Someone to think alongside, in the terminal you already live in.
legal.body:
Contact email: {contactEmail}.

Hosting provider
Vercel Inc., 440 N Barranca Ave #4133, Covina, CA 91723, United States.

Publication director
Antoine Bernier.


PRIVACY POLICY

Data collected
This site sets no cookies and collects no personal data. Traffic is measured anonymously with Vercel Analytics (cookieless).

Claudia's data
Claudia's memory lives in plain Markdown under ~/.claudia, on your machine вЂ” nothing is uploaded to any Claudia server. Conversations are processed by Anthropic's Claude under the terms of your own Claude Code account.

Not a medical device
Claudia is free, open-source software under the MIT license. It is not a medical device, provides no medical or psychological care, and is not a substitute for professional help. In an emergency, contact your local emergency services.
meta.tagline: a confidant, as a Claude Code plugin
